Our Story

Sweet Layers brings the authentic taste of traditional Chinese bakeries to your home. Our master bakers use time-honored recipes passed down through generations, combined with the finest ingredients to create pastries that are both beautiful and delicious.

From our signature mooncakes to delicate egg tarts, every item is crafted with care and precision, ensuring you experience the true artistry of Chinese pastry making.

Learn More About Us

Sweet Layers

Premium artisan Chinese pastries and mooncakes, handcrafted with love and tradition.
